title: Rei Compatability Test
wikitext:
[]: Rei Compatability Test             Quote Post by Practice » Mon Feb 25, 2013 2:32 pm Compatability test if you're bored or have a few minutes to kill! I accept these results as concrete proof that Rei is mai waifu. Any other interesting/neat little Eva quizzes or what not like this that people have found?

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Feb 25, 2013 2:39 pm I am Fuyutsuki, at 67% compatibility. I'm not interested in Rei anyway, but Fuyutsuki is cool. Oh, and I had abstract, introvert, logical, dominating.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Feb 25, 2013 2:41 pm We'll see about that one, laddie. Rei Ayanami, at 99%.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Feb 25, 2013 2:43 pm 99% compatible. Or I can pretend to be, anyway. Muahahahaha.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Feb 25, 2013 2:44 pm 82% compatible, and I'm a Shinji... Sounds about right.

[]:             Quote Post by Na7e » Mon Feb 25, 2013 2:49 pm Kaji with 12% for Rei. Which really doesn't bother because I have Misato and Asuka instead.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Mon Feb 25, 2013 2:50 pm I'm Maya, and I'm 67% compatible. [size=7.5]I'm probably 100% compatible with Ritsuko then.[/size]

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:03 pm Lol, I just wonder which sort of fanboi without life designs a test about how compatible you'd be with some fictional character... but it sorta is well made. But yay, I got 82%! And I'm apparently most like Shinji, whatever that means. ...is it possible to get Gendo as a result?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:04 pm It seems to mean you're me - or I'm you!

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:21 pm The fuck? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:27 pm I've always thought I would be compatible with Rei too, not for emotional reasons but because I'm a self centered monster who would enjoy dating a girl who has no real personality or life outside of me. That's right, Anno. Come. Face me. I see farther than you. That may have been the most freudian typo ever.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:30 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:34 pm riffraff11235 wrote: I guess a 0% would be Asuka, then?

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:36 pm Perpetually mind.

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:39 pm 85% compatibility, I am Shinji Ikari.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:41 pm you are most like the Evangelion character: Shinji Ikari and you are 87% compatible with Rei I thought I stopped being 14 years old.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:43 pm Got a 63%, with Ritsuko. Not too bad, but I'm going to tinker with the test, see how to get a perfect score, and how to fail it. I'll edit in the results in no time. Don't look if you don't want to sub-consciously rig your answers, if you haven't taken the test. In attempt to get with Rei  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:46 pm 400% with Rei, fuck you CJD for doubting my undying something for Rei

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Feb 25, 2013 3:49 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: 400% with Rei, fuck you CJD for doubting me

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon Feb 25, 2013 4:02 pm Considering how it is 400%, it would be you occupying four copies of her, rather than just one.

I accept these results as concrete proof that Rei is mai waifu. Any other interesting/neat little Eva quizzes or what not like this that people have found?

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon Feb 25, 2013 2:39 pm I am F
